title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama. Chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers. Same features as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package. Use Ollama models as LLMs, chat, or embeddings inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI). ChatGPT-style interface, model manager, multi-user, RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Generate, chat, pull models, list running models, and stream responses.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate for Ollama. Strongly-typed APIs for chat, completion, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model privately. Slash commands, thread support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial interactive CLI wrapper with history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a local GitHub Copilot replacement. Inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma. Ingest PDFs, query with natural language, cite sources.

title: ollama-nvidia-trt
summary: Experimental PR adding TensorRT-LLM backend to Ollama for faster inference on NVIDIA GPUs.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that adds /ollama slash command to query local models. Thread-aware, streaming responses.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for Ollama. Chat, generate, and embed with strongly-typed models and streams.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset. Use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-rustic
summary: Alternative Rust client focused on ergonomic async APIs and native tokio runtime integration.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama functions to MCP clients (Claude Desktop, etc.).

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async enumerable streaming and strongly-typed request/response models.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client library for Ollama. Minimal dependencies, cross-compilation friendly, streaming support.
